original_query: select sum(distinct deptno), count(distinct deptno), min(deptno) from emp;
rewritten_query:
SELECT SUM(deptno), COUNT(deptno), MIN(deptno) 
FROM (SELECT DISTINCT deptno FROM emp) AS sub;

rewrite_suggestion.produced_suggestion: Compute the distinct deptno values once in a subquery and then apply the aggregate functions on the smaller result set, rather than computing distinct values separately for each aggregate function.
